subcodes.first_line: O noble Khalil! Thou art ever present in 'Abdu'l-Bahá's heart, and we are constantly occupied with thy remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خلیل جلیل همیشه در قلب عبدالبهاء موجودی و دائما بیاد تو مشغولیم دقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
